data.title: PrideStaff Visalia offices under new ownership by Daren and Terri Kneeland, effective Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: The Visalia, California offices of PrideStaff, a staffing organization, are set to have new ownership under Strategic-Partners Daren and Terri Kneeland starting from Feb. 16, 2026. This transition involves both the PrideStaff and PrideStaff Financial branches.

data.title: Tax planning expert in Delaware discusses year-round tax planning for businesses in HelloNation article.
data.description: In New Castle and Middletown, Delaware, on February 16, 2026, businesses are encouraged to view tax planning as an ongoing commitment throughout the year, rather than a rushed task at the last minute. An article by HelloNation discusses the importance of small-business tax planning in improving financial management.

data.title: On 2/16, BTC, ETH, BNB, and others see stalling relief rallies near resistance levels, suggesting bearish control.
data.description: The recent increases in Bitcoin and various major altcoins are hitting a roadblock as they approach their individual resistance levels, indicating that the bears are still dominating the market.

data.title: Exa Capital buys StaffReady, a SaaS platform for clinical workforce management in healthcare. Founded in 1995, StaffReady is cloud-native since 2002.
data.description: Exa Capital, a strategic long-term operator focusing on acquiring and maintaining enterprise software companies indefinitely, has recently completed the purchase of StaffReady. StaffReady is a prominent Software as a Service (SaaS) platform specializing in clinical workforce management within the healthcare sector. Established in 1995 and operating on the cloud since 2002, StaffReady provides a vital platform specifically designed for overseeing clinical workforces in various healthcare fields. This acquisition solidifies Exa Capital's commitment to expanding its portfolio within the industry.

data.title: Red Sea Global announces ADRENA, a new adventure and entertainment district in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
data.description: A new adventure and entertainment district called ADRENA is set to be opened by RSG in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This district aims to cater to visitors from The Red Sea region and beyond.

data.title: Hong Kong regulator approves Victory Fintech as trading platform; 1st crypto firm licensed since June 2025.
data.description: The Securities and Futures Commission has recently granted its first license to a cryptocurrency company since June 2025. This approval marks a significant milestone for the industry, following the regulatory green light given to Hong Kong BGE during that period. This move signifies a noteworthy development in the cryptocurrency sector and emphasizes the growing importance of regulatory compliance.

data.title: Four Bay Legal, PC attorneys make 2026 Northern California Super Lawyers Rising Stars list for expertise in estate planning, real estate, construction, and asset protection.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Bay Legal, PC, a law firm specializing in estate planning, real estate, construction, probate, and asset protection, revealed that four of its lawyers were named to the 2026 Northern California Super Lawyers list. This recognition underscores the firm's expertise in various legal areas and highlights the outstanding performance of its legal team.

data.title: Pardee Resources Company (OTC: PDER) reports Greenbrier Minerals idling mines in Logan County, West Virginia.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on February 16, 2026, Pardee Resources Company (OTC: PDER) revealed that Greenbrier Minerals had distributed a Worker Adjustment Retraining notification at the Company's facility in Logan County, West Virginia. Greenbrier, a coal operator on the Company's property, delivered the notice to the employees.

data.title: CPP partners with Silva MD Anti-Aging & Wellness in Chula Vista, CA. Collaboration led by Melinda Silva, MD.
data.description: A significant collaboration was unveiled today as Cosmetic Physician Partners (CPP), the leading network of medical aesthetic clinics in the US, revealed their partnership with Silva MD Anti-Aging & Wellness. The institute is helmed by Melinda Silva, MD, ABAARM, FAARM, a well-respected Board-Certified professional. The announcement, made in Chula Vista, California on Feb. 16, 2026, marks a key alliance in the industry.
